diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class, types for env/error/handler/middleware, Context, HonoRequest, and client types
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, Next, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point, re-exports everything from submodules
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports Hono class and 10+ types in a single barrel module, 53 lines total
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Bindings, Variables, Env, Next, Input, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, HandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface
+- Internal names noticed: RouterRoute, BlankSchema, BlankInput, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, IntersectNonAnyTypes, Simplify
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Contains all TypeScript types for handlers, routes, env vars, and HTTP responses
+- Copy-safe detail: 1700+ lines of conditional types for handler chaining (x1 through x10) and middleware patterns
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, HonoBase
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Simple Hono class that extends HonoBase with default router setup
+- Copy-safe detail: 34 lines, constructor initializes router and calls super
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class (also exported as HonoBase), get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use methods
+- Internal names noticed: compose, Context, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, COMPOSED_HANDLER, getPath, getPathNoStrict
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./router, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Core Hono implementation with routing, middleware, request dispatch, error/notFound handling
+- Copy-safe detail: 545 lines: class properties, constructor with route registration, route()/basePath()/mount() methods, fetch/request/fire entry points
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, get, set, res, event, executionCtx, var, header, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound methods
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, Result, Renderer, DefaultRenderer, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, TEXT_PLAIN, setDefaultContentType, createResponseInstance
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime
+- Plain-English summary: Request/response lifecycle context, manages headers/body/status, text/json/html helpers, variable storage, execution context
+- Copy-safe detail: 780 lines: interfaces for typed responses (TextRespond, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond, BodyRespond), class with getter/setter properties and response methods
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, cloneRawRequest
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT, HTTPException, BodyCache, HonoRequest<P,I>, parseBody
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Wraps native Request, gets param/query/header, caches body parsing (text/json/arrayBuffer/blob/bytes/formData), validates input
+- Copy-safe detail: 505 lines: param/query/queries/header methods, body caching logic with #cachedBody, get url/method, matchedRoutes/routePath properties, cloneRawRequest utility
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
+- Internal names noticed: none
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Singleton export for request match result symbol
+- Copy-safe detail: 1 line, unique symbol export
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody
+- Internal names noticed: BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, convertFormDataToBodyData
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request, ./parseFormData
+- Plain-English summary: Parses request body for form-data, form-urlencoded, json; handles dot notation nesting and all option for arrays
+- Copy-safe detail: 233 lines: types for body data parsing, parseBody async function, parseFormData and handlers for all/dot options
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose
+- Internal names noticed: Context, Env, ErrorHandler, NotFoundHandler, Next
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition based on koa-compose, dispatches handlers in stack order
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines: outer function returns dispatch closure, inner async dispatch function handles index/error/notFound, sets context.res
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class
+- Internal names noticed: ContentfulStatusCode, HTTPExceptionOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP error class thrown on auth failures, has res property, getResponse() returns Response or builds one from message
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines: class extends Error, constructor sets status and message, getResponse() checks self.res or returns new Response
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: none
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Barrel export for HTTP client: hc function, parseResponse function, types and utilities
+- Copy-safe detail: 17 lines, re-exports everything from submodules
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc, ClientRequestImpl class
+- Internal names noticed: BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, Callback, mergePath, deepMerge, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ./types, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Proxy-based HTTP client (hc) that builds request objects, handles query/path params, cookie serialization, method routing
+- Copy-safe detail: 223 lines: createProxy creates proxy, ClientRequestImpl class with fetch method, hc function returns proxy, ws protocol support
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: hc, ClientRequestOptions, ClientResponse, ClientRequest, Fetch, BuildSearchParamsFn, DetailedError, parseResponse
+- Internal names noticed: MethodNameAll, StandardMethods, ExpandAllMethod, ClientResponseOfEndpoint, BuildSearch, BuildPath, BuildTypedURL, HonoURL, TypedURL, PathToChain, Client, Callback, ObjectType
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ../utils/http-status, ../utils/types, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Client-side API types: response shapes, request options, path building, URL construction, method chaining (get/post/etc), type inference helpers
+- Copy-safe detail: 393 lines: 5+ conditional types expand $all to all methods, ClientResponse has body/header/status, Client has method stubs, PathToChain does path navigation
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: None
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: URL helpers for client: merge base/path, replace path params, build query strings, protocol switcher, deep merge, response parser
+- Copy-safe detail: 114 lines: mergePath replaces trailing/special leading slashes, removeIndexString removes /index, buildSearchParams converts object to URLSearchParams, deepMerge recursive merge, parseResponse uses fetchRP and filters by status
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError class
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses (set), DetailedError (class), jsonRegex, detectResponseType
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Parses fetch Response, skips 1xx/204/205/304, auto-detects json vs text by content-type, throws DetailedError on non-2xx
+- Copy-safe detail: 95 lines: detectResponseType reads content-type, matches /json or /text regex, fetchRP awaits response and calls json/text based on type
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire, handle
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, Schema
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter: fire() registers app, handle() returns FetchEvent listener that invokes app.fetch
+- Copy-safe detail: 36 lines: fire calls addEventListener('fetch'), handle returns async function wrapping app.fetch
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, Schema, FetchEvent, HandleOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./service-worker/types
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker request handler, wraps app.fetch in async, calls opts.fetch on 404
+- Copy-safe detail: 37 lines: HandleOptions type extends fetch, handle returns function taking FetchEvent, calls evt.respondWith with app.fetch
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent
+- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent, FetchEvent
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker event types: FetchEvent extends ExtendableEvent with request/respondWith and preloadResponse
+- Copy-safe detail: 14 lines: two interfaces, FetchEvent adds clientId/handled/preloadResponse/request/resultingClientId to ExtendableEvent
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
I need to first read all the listed files to understand their content before creating the bench-artifacts directory and the ledger file.
I'll read all the listed files from the repository first, then create the bench-artifacts directory and the ledger file.
